zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Rutherford - Fourth of that Ilk於1263年出生在蘇格蘭時，他的父親Peter de Rotherfield39歲，母親Albreda Deincourt42歲。他於1285年與Johanna de Heaton結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1338年在蘇格蘭皮布萊爾韋斯特 林頓享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert de Rutherford - Fourth of that Ilk于1263年出生在苏格兰时，他的父亲Peter de Rotherfield39岁，母亲Albreda Deincourt42岁。他于1285年与Johanna de Heaton结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1338年在苏格兰皮布萊爾韋斯特 林頓享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rutherford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern English: habitational name from Rutherford in Maxton (Roxburghshire), apparently named with Old English hrīther, hrȳther ‘ox’ + ford ‘ford’, though a British Celtic origin of the type ro- ‘great’ + dubr- ‘water, river’ is also possible for the first element. Places named Rutherford in West Linton (West Lothian) and Barningham (North Yorkshire) are less likely sources of the name.

variants.name: Reliford
meanings: Altered form of English   Rutherford  . Its bearers are mainly African Americans. Compare   Relaford  ,   Releford  ,   Relford  .

variants.name: Retherford
meanings: Altered form of English   Rutherford  .

nameMeanings.name: Fourth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Ford   1.

German: topographic name for someone who lived by a ford, Middle High German vort, vurt, Middle Low German vorde ‘ford, entrance way’, or a habitational name from a place in Franconia or in former Pomerania (now Poland) named Forth.

variants.name: Ford
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near a ford (Middle English, Old English ford), or a habitational name from one of the many places called with this word, such as Ford (Durham, Herefordshire, Northumberland, Shropshire, Sussex), Ford in Sefton (Lancashire), Ford in Crediton and Ford in Holcombe Rogus (both Devon), Ford in Litton and Ford in Wiveliscombe (both Somerset).

Irish: Anglicized form (quasi-translation) of various Gaelic names, for example MacGiolla na Naomh ‘son of Gilla na Naomh’ (a personal name meaning ‘servant of the saints’), Mac Conshámha ‘son of Conshnámha’ (a personal name composed of the elements con ‘dog’ + snámh ‘to swim’), in all of which the final syllable was wrongly thought to be áth ‘ford’, and Ó Fuar(th)áin (see Foran ).
Americanized form of French   Faure   ‘blacksmith’.

variants.name: Fortmann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Guenther.
German: topographic name for someone who lived by a ford, Middle High German vort, vurt ‘ford’. See Forth .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
Chinese:
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: that
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, from Middle High German tal ‘valley’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Tal ‘valley’.

variants.name: Thalmann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ruediger, Erwin, Hans, Heinz, Kurt, Manfred, Rudi.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Thal with the addition of Middle High German man, German Mann ‘man’.
German (Thälmann): from a personal name from Old High German diot ‘people, tribe’ (ancient Germanic theudo-) + man ‘man’.

variants.name: Thall
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Aron, Hyman, Isadore.
Probably an altered form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Thal  .

nameMeanings.name: Ilk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk): nickname from Middle English milk ‘milk’ (Old English meolc). There are many possible reasons for the use of such a nickname, including milk-white hair, the collecting or selling of milk, and of course the drinking of milk – whether or not taken to indicate effeminacy or spiritlessness.

Sorbian: from a pet form of a personal name such as Miłosław, based on the Slavic element mil ‘gentle, dear’ (from Old Slavic milъ). This surname is found mainly in Germanized forms, such as Mielke and Milke .
Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Milch   ‘milk’.

variants.name: Mielke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Erwin, Erna, Kurt, Reinhard, Arno, Erhardt, Ernst, Ewald, Frieda, Fritz.
German (of Slavic origin): from a Germanized pet form of any of various Old Slavic personal names, such as Milogost, based on the element mil ‘gentle, dear’ (from Old Slavic milъ); compare 3 below.
North German: from a pet form of the personal name   Miele   4, of ancient Germanic origin.

variants.name: Milks
meanings: English: variant of Milk , with excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Rutherford - Fourth of that Ilk was born in 1263, in Scotland, his father, Peter de Rotherfield, was 39 and his mother, Albreda Deincourt, was 42. He married Johanna de Heaton in 1285. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1338, in West Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland, at the age of 75.

fr.West Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland: West Linton, Valle de Twede, Écosse
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Rutherford - Fourth of that Ilk est né en 1263, à Écosse, son père, Peter de Rotherfield, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Albreda Deincourt, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Johanna de Heaton en 1285. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1338, à West Linton, Valle de Twede, Écosse, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert de Rutherford - Fourth of that Ilk 1263 in Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Peter de Rotherfield 39 und seine Mutter Albreda Deincourt 42. Er hat 1285 Johanna de Heaton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1338 im Alter von 75 Jahren in West Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Rutherford - Fourth of that Ilk è nato il nel 1263 nel Scotland, il suo padre, Peter de Rotherfield, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Albreda Deincourt, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Johanna de Heaton nel 1285. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1338, nel West Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland, all'età di 75 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Rutherford - Fourth of that Ilk(이)가 1263년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter de Rotherfield(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Albreda Deincourt(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1285년 Johanna de Heaton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1338년 스컷랜드 피블레실르 웨스트 린턴에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Rutherford - Fourth of that Ilk nasceu em 1263, em Scotland, seu pai, Peter de Rotherfield, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Albreda Deincourt, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna de Heaton em 1285. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1338, em West Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Rutherford - Fourth of that Ilk родился в 1263 г. в местности Шотландия, его отцу по имени Peter de Rotherfield было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Albreda Deincourt, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna de Heaton в 1285 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1338 г. в местности вест линтон, пиблессхир, Шотландия в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert de Rutherford - Fourth of that Ilk nació en 1263, en Scotland, su papá, Peter de Rotherfield, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Albreda Deincourt, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Johanna de Heaton en 1285. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1338, en West Linton, Peeblesshire, Scotland, a la edad de 75 años.
